description: The Aam Aadmi Party government in Punjab moved a confidence motion in the state assembly following the defection of seven MPs to the BJP. Chief Minister Bhagwant Mann asserted the party's strength and national presence, aiming to dispel rumors of instability. AAP holds a significant majority in the 117-member assembly.

description: Rahul Gandhi has sharply criticized the Centre over rising inflation, highlighting a significant Rs 993 jump in commercial LPG cylinder prices in a single day. He warned that this surge, amounting to an 81% increase over three months, will heavily impact small businesses and household expenses, predicting further hikes in petrol and diesel prices.

'Dhurandhar 2' BO day 44 [LIVE]: Ranveer Singh film misses breaching global record of 'Baahubali 2' by Rs 3 crore
description: ‘Dhurandhar 2: The Revenge’ is rewriting the record books as it nears the end of its seventh week. Having already become the first Hindi film to join the Rs. 1,000 crore net club in India, the film’s total domestic net now stands at a staggering Rs. 1,135.25 crore. On Day 44 of its theatrical run, live tracking shows the film maintaining a steady grip on the audience despite a reduced screen count. With a current worldwide gross of Rs. 1,783.90 crore, the Ranveer Singh-starrer is just steps away from overtaking the lifetime global collections of Baahubali 2.

CEO says ‘When Google CEO agrees with Elon, everyone must pay attention’; Musk responds
description: Elon Musk agreed with a post highlighting Google CEO Sundar Pichai's vision of space-based data centers becoming "the new normal" within a decade. This aligns with Musk's own long-held views on utilizing space for large-scale infrastructure. Pichai previously mentioned Google's "moon shot" to place data centers in orbit to harness solar energy, with a first step planned for 2027.

title: Maria Sharapova net worth 2026: $200m fortune from tennis & investments
description: Maria Sharapova, a tennis icon, amassed an estimated $180 million net worth primarily through lucrative endorsement deals and her candy brand, Sugarpova. Her remarkable career included winning all four Grand Slams and reaching world No. 1. After retiring in 2020, she continues to thrive in business and investments, maintaining her global recognition.
